channel.title: OSINT on Hexomedine
channel.description: Recent content in OSINT on Hexomedine

item.title: [Root-Me 10k CTF] OSINT - Find Our Roots
item.description: The challenge The OSINT challenge was to find the name and the call sign of the boat on the picture below. Here’s the description of the challenge : Write-Up exif data ? So the first thing I’ve done is to check the image with exiftool to see if there’s nothing helpful. We can see that the picture has a creator, “Rene Te Pas” and a creation date. On to google I reverse search the image on google and yandex but I found nothing that useful.
